message: Rugged Phone batch ET-RP-260507-A03 shows waterproof seal failure above threshold.
Smart Watch batch ET-SW-260507-B01 shows increased solder bridge defects.
Industrial Smartphone batch ET-IP-260507-C02 shows LTE signal instability during RF test.
Smart Watch batch ET-SW-260507-B02 shows display color shift during calibration.
Special-purpose Wearable Device batch ET-WD-260507-D02 requires burn-in retest.
